title: 持牌 vs 代表 / Licence vs representative
point: 牌照发给 FA 实体;个人是经 RNF 登记的委任代表。 / The FA entity is licensed; individuals are appointed representatives registered via RNF.
keyfacts: 个人不单独持牌 / Individuals not separately licensed
sourceRef: Financial Advisers Act (FAA) & Financial Advisers Regulations (FAR)

title: Fit & Proper
point: 代表须符合诚信、能力、财务稳健标准。 / Representatives must meet integrity, competence and financial-soundness standards.
keyfacts: 展业前须登记 / Register before practising
sourceRef: Financial Advisers Act (FAA) & Financial Advisers Regulations (FAR)
